title: turnera lucida
intro: Turnera lucida, also known as Yellow Bells, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Passifloraceae family, native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera lucida include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and stress, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Turnera lucida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
